changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE timetable.tasks ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4() NOT NULL, org_id INT NOT NULL, message TEXT, is_success BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, is_finished BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, created_by INT, created_date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
